home.heroSub: A professional-grade investment platform built for those who take their financial future seriously.

features.secureDesc: Military-level encryption and multi-factor authentication protect every transaction and your personal data.
features.profitDesc: Smart investment plans engineered for steady, compounding growth — built for long-term wealth creation.
features.globalDesc: Manage and monitor your portfolio from anywhere in the world, on any device, at any time.

steps.title: Get Started in 3 Steps
steps.step1Desc: Sign up in under 2 minutes with just your email.
steps.step2Desc: Pick an investment plan that fits your financial goals.
steps.step3Desc: Track your returns in real time on your dashboard.

cta.title: Ready to Build Real Wealth?
cta.sub: Join thousands of investors already growing their capital with MexicaTrading.

dashboard.noActivePlansDesc: Start growing your wealth by choosing an investment plan tailored for you.
dashboard.noCompletedPlansDesc: Your completed investments and earned profits will appear here.
dashboard.noTransactionsDesc: Your deposits, withdrawals and activity history will show up here.
dashboard.referralDesc: Earn 5% commission on every friend you refer
dashboard.referralNote: Share this link — when your friend makes their first deposit, you earn 5% automatically.
dashboard.emailVerifyDesc: Check your inbox for the verification link we sent you
dashboard.kycInviteTitle: You've been invited to verify your identity
dashboard.kycInviteDesc: Complete KYC verification for a better and more secure experience
dashboard.kycPendingDesc: Your documents are being reviewed — tap to track progress
dashboard.kycRejectedDesc: Your documents were rejected — tap to resubmit

deposit.title: Deposit Funds
deposit.subtitle: Add funds to your investment account
deposit.txidPlaceholder: Paste your TxID or proof here

withdraw.title: Withdraw Funds
withdraw.subtitle: Request a withdrawal from your investment account
withdraw.caution: Double-check your withdrawal details before submitting. Incorrect information may result in permanent loss of funds.
withdraw.noBalanceDesc: You don't have any balance yet. Make your first deposit to start investing and growing your wealth.
withdraw.noInvestmentDesc: You have a balance but haven't invested yet. Choose a plan, earn your profits, then withdraw your earnings!
withdraw.frozenDesc: Withdrawals are currently suspended on your account. Please contact support.
withdraw.kycPendingDesc: Your identity documents are being reviewed. This usually takes less than 24 hours.
withdraw.kycRejectedDesc: Your identity verification was rejected. Please resubmit clear photos.

messages.title: Messages
messages.noMessagesDesc: Messages from MexicaTrading support will appear here.
messages.contactSupport: Need help? Contact us at support@mexicatrading.com

kyc.title: KYC Verification
kyc.subtitle: Verify your identity to unlock full withdrawal access
kyc.selfieDesc: Hold your ID clearly visible — max 5MB
kyc.tip1: Make sure all text on your ID is clearly readable
kyc.tip2: Use good lighting — avoid shadows and glare
kyc.tip3: Hold your ID next to your face in the selfie
kyc.tip4: Do not crop or edit the photos
kyc.approvedDesc: Your identity has been verified successfully. You have full access to all withdrawal features.
kyc.pendingDesc: Your documents are being reviewed by our team. This usually takes less than 24 hours.
kyc.pendingNote: You will receive an email once your verification is complete.
kyc.rejectedDesc: Please resubmit clear, readable photos below.
kyc.rejectPlaceholder: Enter rejection reason (e.g. ID is blurry, selfie not clear)...

auth.signInDesc: Sign in to access your investment dashboard
auth.joinDesc: Join MexicaTrading and start building wealth today
auth.emailVerified: Email verified successfully! You can now log in to your account.
auth.verificationSent: We sent a verification email to
auth.checkInbox: Please check your inbox and click the verification link to activate your account before logging in.
auth.redirecting: Redirecting to login in a few seconds...
auth.referralDesc: You were referred by a friend — code:
auth.termsAgree: By registering, you agree to our

forgot.title: Forgot Password?
forgot.desc: Enter your email address and we'll send you a secure link to reset your password.
forgot.checkInbox: Check your inbox! If an account exists with that email, you'll receive a reset link within a few minutes.

reset.title: Reset Your Password
reset.desc: Enter your new password below. Make sure it's strong and secure.
reset.success: Your password has been reset successfully! You will be redirected to the login page in a moment.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Please read these Terms and Conditions carefully before using MexicaTrading.
terms.agreement: By using MexicaTrading, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms & Conditions.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: This Privacy Policy explains how MexicaTrading collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
privacy.commitment: Your privacy is important to us. We are committed to protecting your personal information at all times.

common.insufficientBalance: Insufficient balance. Please deposit funds first.
common.choosePlanDesc: Select the investment plan that best fits your financial goals and start growing your wealth today.
common.noPlansDesc: Investment plans will appear here once they are added.
